events.name: Delegation Created
events.description: Tenant member created an OOF / handover / emergency delegation. Feeds product-team analysis of OOF adoption + delegate-selection patterns.

events.name: Delegation Revoked Early
events.description: Delegator revoked before ends_at. duration_actual vs duration_planned reveals whether tenants tend to over-allot or under-allot OOF windows.

events.name: Delegation Used In Approval
events.description: Fired by RecordDelegationUsageInApproverResolution listener when workflow/approvals substituted a delegate for a delegator during approver resolution. This is THE product-analytics signal answering 'is OOF actually being used'.

events.name: Impersonation Started
events.description: Note: NEVER include tenant_id or impersonated_user_id in analytics payload — those are PII / regulated. Only aggregate labels.

events.name: Impersonation Ended
events.description: duration_seconds_bucket: 0-60s / 1-5min / 5-15min / 15-30min / 30-60min / 60+min. Feeds product-team analysis of how long support sessions actually take.

events.name: Impersonation Attempt Refused
events.description: Reveals pattern of denied-impersonation attempts. Feeds security-team review of whether operators are hitting refusal gates that should be relaxed or tightened.
